## Verses (9)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Let the Lord be praised. Make a new song to the Lord, let his praise be in the meeting of his saints. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Let Israel have joy in his maker; let the children of Zion be glad in their King. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Let them give praise to his name in the dance: let them make melody to him with instruments of brass and corded instruments of music. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | For the Lord has pleasure in his people: he gives the poor in spirit a crown of salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Let the saints have joy and glory: let them give cries of joy on their beds. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Let the high praises of God be in their mouths, and a two-edged sword in their hands; | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | To give the nations the reward of their sins, and the peoples their punishment; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | To put their kings in chains, and their rulers in bands of iron; | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | To give them the punishment which is in the holy writings: this honour is given to all his saints. Praise be to the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |

<!-- END AUTO-INDEX -->
